1) **Restart/build status:** ✅ Manual gateway restart for **“Telegram /restart”** is complete; gateway booted successfully, and Telegram polling is back up. 3) **What should I verify next?** If you want, I can check one specific path next—e.g., `/status` response, `/model` routing, or a fresh photo+caption intake test in Telegram.
